zh-tw.title: 學生厭世語錄
zh-tw.description: 從早八、小組報告到期末週崩潰，每個還在學校裡掙扎的學生都懂的共感金句，在校生專屬的廢話文學

en.title: Student Life Quotes
en.description: From 8 a.m. lectures to group projects and finals-week meltdowns — relatable lines every student stuck on campus will feel in their soul

items.sourceNote: Dcard 升大學板 早八共感格式改寫

zh-tw.content:
選課的時候我以為自己會早起，
早八第三週，我已經改用老師的課堂直播當鬧鐘了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開學選到早八後發限動的標準自嘲，同病相憐的同學會秒回。
variations: 進階版：「早八不是一堂課，是一種修行。」
也能換成：「我跟早八的關係，就是它每週準時，我每週遲到。」

en.content:
When I picked my classes I genuinely believed I'd become a morning person.
Week three of the 8 a.m. lecture, I'm using the recorded livestream as my alarm clock.
en.editorNote: The go-to caption for anyone who scheduled an early class and instantly regretted it.
variations: Harder mode: "An 8 a.m. class isn't a course, it's a spiritual trial."
Swap in: "Me and my morning lecture: it shows up on time, I don't."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 大學生 小組作業常見抱怨改寫

zh-tw.content:
小組報告的真相：
一個人做事，三個人掛名，還有一個人在問什麼時候要交。
zh-tw.editorNote: 被當組長獨自爆肝後，丟到班級群組會引發大量共鳴。
variations: 也能換成：「分工表上五個人，凌晨三點的會議室只有我自己。」
進階版：「組員已讀不回的速度，比我做報告的速度還快。」

en.content:
The truth about group projects:
one person does the work, three put their names on it, and one keeps asking when it's due.
en.editorNote: Post-meltdown caption for the group leader who pulled the whole thing alone.
variations: Swap in: "Five names on the cover page, one person in the 3 a.m. study room."
Harder mode: "My teammates leave my messages on read faster than I finish the slides."

items.sourceNote: 大學生熬夜趕報告共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
報告的繳交期限是凌晨十二點，
我的靈感則是在十一點五十八分準時報到。
zh-tw.editorNote: 趕 deadline 趕到天亮的人都懂，適合搭配一張凌亂書桌的照片。
variations: 也能換成：「不是我愛拖，是壓力到了才肯給我靈感。」
進階版：「靈感跟公車一樣，要等到最後一刻才會一起來。」

en.content:
The assignment is due at midnight,
and my inspiration clocks in promptly at 11:58 p.m.
en.editorNote: For everyone who's pulled an all-nighter against a deadline — pair it with a photo of a chaotic desk.
variations: Swap in: "I'm not lazy, my brain just refuses to work until the pressure hits."
Harder mode: "Inspiration is like the bus — it only shows up at the last possible second."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 翹課話題 改寫

zh-tw.content:
今天我沒翹課，
不是因為我突然變認真，是因為今天剛好要點名。
zh-tw.editorNote: 出席率全靠點名表現的同學的真心話，丟群組大家會心一笑。
variations: 也能換成：「我跟這堂課的緣分，全看老師今天點不點名。」
進階版：「老師說『今天不點名』那一刻，整間教室瞬間少一半人。」

en.content:
I didn't skip class today —
not because I suddenly got serious, but because today happens to be attendance day.
en.editorNote: The honest confession of anyone whose attendance rate is held up entirely by roll call.
variations: Swap in: "My bond with this class depends entirely on whether the professor takes attendance."
Harder mode: "The second the prof says 'no roll call today,' half the room vanishes."

items.sourceNote: 期末週崩潰 register 改寫

zh-tw.content:
期末週的我，
成功把「等等再讀」這四個字，活成了一種人生哲學。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末週發限動配書還沒翻開的照片，朋友一看就懂。
variations: 也能換成：「進度條卡在百分之零，但我的焦慮已經滿格。」
進階版：「考試範圍我背得很熟，背的是『範圍』兩個字。」

en.content:
During finals week,
I've successfully turned "I'll study later" into an entire philosophy of life.
en.editorNote: Post this during finals next to a photo of an unopened textbook — friends will get it instantly.
variations: Swap in: "Progress bar stuck at zero, anxiety bar completely full."
Harder mode: "I know the exam scope by heart — just the word 'scope,' though."

items.sourceNote: 不及格自嘲 廢文金句改寫

zh-tw.content:
六十分萬歲，五十九分對不起父母，
但說實話，這次我連對不起的資格都沒準備好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 成績單發下來後的自我安慰，越廢越有共鳴。
variations: 也能換成：「低空飛過也是飛過，重點是飛過。」
進階版：「分數不重要，重要的是我跟它一樣，沒什麼內容。」

en.content:
Sixty is a victory, fifty-nine is an apology to my parents —
but honestly, this time I didn't even prepare enough to deserve the apology.
en.editorNote: Self-soothing caption for the day grades drop — the more deadpan, the more relatable.
variations: Swap in: "Barely passing is still passing. Focus on the 'passing' part."
Harder mode: "The grade doesn't matter — what matters is that it and I both have no substance."

items.sourceNote: 通識課選課標準 改寫

zh-tw.content:
我選通識課的標準只有三個：
不點名、能涼、最好還能加分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 選課週的真心話，丟到系上群組會被瘋狂認同。
variations: 也能換成：「營養學分不是學分，是大學生活的維生素。」
進階版：「課表排得鬆不鬆，決定我這學期快不快樂。」

en.content:
I have exactly three criteria for picking an elective:
no roll call, easy grading, and ideally a curve.
en.editorNote: The course-registration confession — drop it in the department group chat for instant agreement.
variations: Swap in: "An easy-A class isn't credit, it's a vitamin for college life."
Harder mode: "How loose my schedule is decides how happy I'll be this semester."

items.sourceNote: 學貸打工 對比厭世改寫

zh-tw.content:
別人的大學是社團、戀愛、出國交換；
我的大學是排班、報告、還有學貸的利息。
zh-tw.editorNote: 半工半讀的同學的真實寫照，配一張打工制服的照片更有畫面。
variations: 也能換成：「我也想說走就走，但我先走去打工。」
進階版：「青春無價，但我的青春正在按時薪計算。」

en.content:
Other people's college years are clubs, dating, and studying abroad;
mine are work shifts, assignments, and the interest on my student loan.
en.editorNote: A real portrait of the working student — even better next to a photo in a part-time uniform.
variations: Swap in: "I'd love a spontaneous trip too — right after my shift."
Harder mode: "Youth is priceless, but mine is currently billed by the hour."

items.sourceNote: 重考生厭世 register 改寫

zh-tw.content:
重考這一年我最大的成長，
是學會對親戚那句「考得怎麼樣」微笑帶過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 重考生過年最有感，適合年節或放榜前後發文。
variations: 也能換成：「我不是失敗，我只是給夢想多買了一年的時間。」
進階版：「同學都升大二了，我還在跟去年的自己同班。」

en.content:
My biggest growth during this gap year of retaking exams
is learning to just smile and dodge when relatives ask, "So how'd it go?"
en.editorNote: Hits hardest for retake students during family gatherings or around results day.
variations: Swap in: "I'm not a failure, I just bought my dream one more year of time."
Harder mode: "My classmates are sophomores now and I'm still in the same class as last year's me."

items.sourceNote: 廢話文學 段考版改寫

zh-tw.content:
考試永遠不會背叛你，
因為你根本沒準備，它連背叛你的機會都不給。
zh-tw.editorNote: 標準廢話文學句型，考前發文用，朋友會說「講得好像很有道理」。
variations: 也能換成：「沒讀的人不會緊張，因為連緊張的本錢都沒有。」
進階版：「不會的題目不用慌，反正會的也沒幾題。」

en.content:
An exam will never betray you,
because you never prepared — it doesn't even get the chance to.
en.editorNote: Classic nonsense-literature format for pre-exam posts. Friends will reply, "weirdly profound."
variations: Swap in: "People who didn't study never panic — they can't afford the panic either."
Harder mode: "Don't stress over the questions you can't do; you couldn't do many of the others either."

items.sourceNote: 圖書館佔位共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
期末週圖書館的位子，
比演唱會的票還難搶；搶到了，也不保證我真的讀得下去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末週去圖書館排隊佔位後發文，校內同學秒懂。
variations: 也能換成：「佔到位子的成就感，已經消耗掉我一半的讀書動力。」
進階版：「我來圖書館不是為了讀書，是為了讓自己看起來有在讀書。」

en.content:
During finals week, a seat in the library
is harder to grab than concert tickets — and grabbing one still doesn't mean I'll actually study.
en.editorNote: Post it after lining up for a library seat during finals; every student on campus gets it.
variations: Swap in: "The thrill of finally getting a seat used up half my motivation to study."
Harder mode: "I don't come to the library to study, I come to look like I'm studying."

items.sourceNote: 咖啡因依賴 自嘲改寫

zh-tw.content:
我的血型是美式咖啡型，
一到期末週就自動升級成濃縮雙份。
zh-tw.editorNote: 離不開咖啡的考生最有感，搭配手搖或便利商店咖啡的照片。
variations: 也能換成：「睡眠是給沒有期末考的人的奢侈品。」
進階版：「咖啡因不是提神，是維持我這個人正常運作的最低需求。」

en.content:
My blood type is Americano,
and it automatically upgrades to a double shot of espresso once finals week hits.
en.editorNote: For students who can't function without coffee — pair with a convenience-store cup.
variations: Swap in: "Sleep is a luxury reserved for people who don't have finals."
Harder mode: "Caffeine isn't a boost, it's the minimum requirement for me to function as a person."

items.sourceNote: 教授名言反差 改寫

zh-tw.content:
教授說：「這個很簡單，大家應該都會。」
翻譯：接下來三十頁，我一個字都看不懂。
zh-tw.editorNote: 聽課聽到放棄的瞬間發文，全班都會默默點頭。
variations: 也能換成：「『這不考』是這堂課我唯一聽懂的一句話。」
進階版：「老師說『剩下回家自己看』，那本書到現在還是新的。」

en.content:
Professor: "This part is easy, everyone should get it."
Translation: for the next thirty pages, I won't understand a single word.
en.editorNote: Post it the moment you give up mid-lecture — the whole class will quietly nod.
variations: Swap in: "'This won't be on the test' is the only sentence I understood all class."
Harder mode: "The prof said 'read the rest at home' — that book is still brand new."

items.sourceNote: 開學收假厭世 改寫

zh-tw.content:
收假前一天的我，和開學第一天的我，
根本是兩個互不相識的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 連假或暑假尾聲的標準厭世文，收假症候群發作時最好用。
variations: 也能換成：「暑假作業的進度條，永遠停在開學前一晚。」
進階版：「放假的時候度日如年，開學之後一週像一天。」

en.content:
The me on the last day of break and the me on the first day of school
are honestly two complete strangers.
en.editorNote: The default end-of-break caption — perfect when post-vacation dread kicks in.
variations: Swap in: "My summer homework progress bar is permanently frozen at the night before school starts."
Harder mode: "On break, a day feels like a year; after school starts, a week feels like a day."

items.sourceNote: 拖延廢文 'I'll start tomorrow' 改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不是不讀書，我只是把開始的時間，
安排在一個永遠到不了的「明天」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 計畫表寫滿、書一頁沒翻的拖延體質專用，貼到群組大家都認領。
variations: 也能換成：「我的讀書計畫很完美，只差『執行』那一步。」
進階版：「明天的我超強，可惜我永遠活在今天。」

en.content:
It's not that I don't study —
I just scheduled my start time for a "tomorrow" that never actually arrives.
en.editorNote: For the chronic procrastinator with a full planner and an untouched textbook. Everyone in the chat will claim it.
variations: Swap in: "My study plan is flawless, it's just missing the 'do it' step."
Harder mode: "Tomorrow-me is unstoppable, shame I'm always stuck living in today."

items.sourceNote: 'brain has too many tabs open' 腦袋分頁梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
期末週我的腦袋開了太多分頁，
現在連哪一頁在播焦慮的背景音樂都找不到。
zh-tw.editorNote: 資訊量爆炸、整個人當機時最有感，配一張同時開十個視窗的螢幕截圖。
variations: 也能換成：「不是我不專心，是我的大腦正在無限轉圈圈讀取中。」
進階版：「要記的東西太多，記憶體不足，已自動關閉『睡眠』程式。」

en.content:
During finals week my brain has too many tabs open,
and now I can't even find which one is playing the anxiety background music.
en.editorNote: Hits hardest when you're info-overloaded and fully buffering. Pair with a screenshot of ten windows open at once.
variations: Swap in: "I'm not distracted, my brain is just stuck on the infinite loading spinner."
Harder mode: "Too much to memorize, out of RAM — the system auto-closed the 'sleep' program."

items.sourceNote: 睡過頭考試 register 改寫

zh-tw.content:
鬧鐘響了十次我都按掉，
第十一次響的時候，是同學打來問我為什麼沒去考試。
zh-tw.editorNote: 睡過頭錯過考試或早八的災難現場，發出來朋友會又笑又同情。
variations: 也能換成：「我的鬧鐘很盡責，是我這個人不盡責。」
進階版：「我不是睡過頭，我只是把考試當成了可選配的行程。」

en.content:
I snoozed my alarm ten times,
and the eleventh ring was a classmate calling to ask why I wasn't at the exam.
en.editorNote: The disaster scene of oversleeping through an exam or 8 a.m. class — friends will laugh and pity you at once.
variations: Swap in: "My alarm is very dedicated, I'm the one who isn't."
Harder mode: "I didn't oversleep, I just treated the exam as an optional add-on."

items.sourceNote: GPA 自嘲 共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
我的 GPA 跟我的存款一樣，
每次查的時候都希望它能多一點，結果每次都讓我安靜地關掉頁面。
zh-tw.editorNote: 查成績後默默闔上電腦的真實寫照，半夜發限動最有共鳴。
variations: 也能換成：「分數沒到，但我的接受度練得很好。」
進階版：「我不是學霸也不是學渣，我是介於兩者之間的學中。」

en.content:
My GPA is like my bank balance:
every time I check it I hope there's a bit more, and every time I just quietly close the tab.
en.editorNote: A true portrait of closing your laptop after checking grades — best posted as a late-night story.
variations: Swap in: "The grade didn't show up, but my acceptance of it is very well trained."
Harder mode: "I'm not a top student or a flunk-out, I'm somewhere in the muddled middle."

items.sourceNote: 宿舍生活 共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
宿舍教會我最重要的一件事：
洗衣機永遠在我有空的時候滿的，在我趕時間的時候壞的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 住宿生的日常崩潰，搶不到洗衣機、室友作息對撞時發最有畫面。
variations: 也能換成：「我跟室友的作息，就像日班跟夜班，永遠在交接，永遠沒見過面。」
進階版：「宿舍的網路速度，決定我今天是個人還是一隻緩衝中的圈圈。」

en.content:
The most important thing dorm life taught me:
the washing machine is always full when I'm free, and always broken when I'm in a rush.
en.editorNote: Everyday dorm meltdown — most vivid when you can't grab a washer or your roommate's schedule clashes with yours.
variations: Swap in: "My roommate and I are like a day shift and a night shift — always handing off, never actually meeting."
Harder mode: "The dorm WiFi speed decides whether I'm a person today or just a buffering spinner."

items.sourceNote: 'finals week is a week-long panic attack with commercial breaks' 期末焦慮梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
期末週不是一個禮拜，
是一場為期七天、中間只有吃飯時間能喘口氣的恐慌發作。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期末週整個人緊繃到極點時發文，全班都會回「+1」。
variations: 也能換成：「期末週的我只有兩種狀態：在崩潰，和準備崩潰。」
進階版：「別問我期末過得好不好，問我還活著就偷笑了。」

en.content:
Finals week isn't a week,
it's a seven-day panic attack with short breaks only for meals.
en.editorNote: Post it when you're wound up to the absolute limit during finals — the whole class will reply '+1'.
variations: Swap in: "During finals I have two modes: melting down, and about to melt down."
Harder mode: "Don't ask if my finals are going well — just be glad I'm still alive."

items.sourceNote: 'reading the same page for 20 minutes' 同一頁讀半天梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
我已經盯著同一頁看了二十分鐘，
眼睛確實在動，但內容一個字都沒進到腦袋裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 讀書讀到放空、靈魂出竅的瞬間發文，朋友會說「這是我」。
variations: 也能換成：「我有在讀書，只是讀的是『發呆』這個科目。」
進階版：「書本翻到下一頁，是我整個下午唯一的進度。」

en.content:
I've been staring at the same page for twenty minutes —
my eyes are definitely moving, but not a single word has reached my brain.
en.editorNote: Post it the moment your soul leaves your body mid-study; friends will reply 'literally me'.
variations: Swap in: "I am studying — I'm just majoring in 'spacing out'."
Harder mode: "Turning to the next page was my only progress all afternoon."

items.sourceNote: 'I survived another semester, my plants didn't' 撐過一學期梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
我成功撐過了這個學期，
代價是我的作息、我的存款，還有桌上那盆早就枯掉的多肉。
zh-tw.editorNote: 學期末勉強存活下來的總結文，適合期末考完或成績出爐後發。
variations: 也能換成：「這學期我沒被當，但我的生活品質被當得很徹底。」
進階版：「能順利結束一學期，已經是我這半年最大的成就。」

en.content:
I survived another semester —
the cost was my sleep schedule, my savings, and the succulent on my desk that died weeks ago.
en.editorNote: A wrap-up caption for barely making it to the end of term; great right after finals or grade releases.
variations: Swap in: "I didn't fail this semester, but my quality of life failed spectacularly."
Harder mode: "Finishing one semester in one piece is the biggest achievement of my half-year."

items.sourceNote: Dcard '大學報告真的是照妖鏡' 小組現形記改寫

zh-tw.content:
大學報告是一面照妖鏡，
你以為的隊友，分組之後才現出原形。
zh-tw.editorNote: 被雷組員氣到後的精準吐槽，丟班群一定有人對號入座。
variations: 也能換成：「不分組永遠不知道，原來身邊藏了這麼多人才——人在報告才出現的那種。」
進階版：「報告繳出去那一刻，我跟組員的緣分也正式結束。」

en.content:
A college group project is a mirror that reveals everyone's true form;
the teammates you thought you knew only show their real selves after the groups are set.
en.editorNote: A precise vent after a nightmare teammate — drop it in the class chat and someone will recognize themselves.
variations: Swap in: "You never know how much 'talent' is around you until a group project — the kind that only shows up on submission day."
Harder mode: "The second we submit the report, my bond with my teammates officially ends."

items.sourceNote: 'energy saving mode' 省電模式梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不是懶，我只是長期處於省電模式，
而且不知道為什麼，充電孔好像壞了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 提不起勁讀書、整個人關機時發文，懶人同好會集體共鳴。
variations: 也能換成：「我的電量永遠停在百分之一，但就是不肯關機。」
進階版：「別人是越戰越勇，我是越讀越想睡。」

en.content:
I'm not lazy, I'm just permanently in energy-saving mode —
and for some reason the charging port seems broken too.
en.editorNote: Post it when you can't muster the will to study and you're fully powered down; fellow slackers will rally.
variations: Swap in: "My battery is stuck at one percent and still refuses to shut off."
Harder mode: "Other people get fired up the more they grind; I just get sleepier the more I read."

items.sourceNote: 'Day 1: organized. Day 2: who am I kidding' 開學決心崩壞梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
開學第一天：這學期我要早睡早起、按時交作業、認真做筆記。
開學第二天：我在騙誰啊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 開學立志文的標準反差，第二天就破功時發，全班秒懂。
variations: 也能換成：「我的新學期目標，通常活不過第一個週末。」
進階版：「每學期開學我都重開機一次，然後照樣當機。」

en.content:
Day one of the semester: this term I'm sleeping early, submitting on time, taking real notes.
Day two: who am I kidding.
en.editorNote: The classic start-of-term resolution that collapses by day two — post it the second reality hits.
variations: Swap in: "My new-semester goals usually don't survive the first weekend."
Harder mode: "Every semester I reboot myself, then crash exactly like before."

items.sourceNote: 'staring at notes until knowledge transfers via osmosis' 滲透式讀書梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
我的考前讀書法很科學：
把書放在胸口睡覺，希望知識能自己滲透進來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前臨時抱佛腳、根本沒讀進去時發文，同溫層集體認領。
variations: 也能換成：「課本壓在枕頭下，我賭的是它會自動上傳到夢裡。」
進階版：「我不是沒讀書，我是在等知識主動來找我。」

en.content:
My pre-exam study method is very scientific:
I sleep with the textbook on my chest and hope the knowledge just soaks in.
en.editorNote: For last-minute cramming that never actually lands — your whole friend group will claim it.
variations: Swap in: "Textbook under the pillow — I'm betting it auto-uploads into my dreams."
Harder mode: "It's not that I didn't study, I'm waiting for the knowledge to come to me."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 大學生 上課打瞌睡 共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不是在上課睡著，
我只是在用閉眼的方式，深度思考老師剛剛講的內容。
zh-tw.editorNote: 上課秒睡被抓包後的嘴硬式解釋，坐後排的同學最有感。
variations: 也能換成：「我沒有打瞌睡，我是在做眼球保養。」
進階版：「教室後排不是座位，是一整排大型充電站。」

en.content:
I wasn't asleep in class,
I was just deeply reflecting on the lecture with my eyes closed.
en.editorNote: The stubborn excuse after getting caught dozing off — back-row students feel this hardest.
variations: Swap in: "I wasn't napping, I was doing eye maintenance."
Harder mode: "The back row isn't seating, it's a whole row of charging stations."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 開學季選課甜涼課 搶不到 共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
選課系統開放的那一刻，
我才發現我的手速，配不上我想涼的心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 加退選搶不到甜涼課、被系統打敗時發文，同屆同學都懂那種痛。
variations: 也能換成：「甜涼課的名額，比演唱會搖滾區還快沒。」
進階版：「課表是別人幫我排的，因為我想選的全都額滿了。」

en.content:
The moment course registration opened,
I realized my typing speed can't keep up with how badly I want an easy class.
en.editorNote: For getting shut out of the easy-A classes on registration day — same-year students know the pain.
variations: Swap in: "Easy-class spots run out faster than front-row concert tickets."
Harder mode: "My schedule was basically picked for me, because everything I wanted was full."

items.sourceNote: 'studying is 10% reading and 90% crying about reading' 讀書比例梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
所謂讀書，其實只有百分之十在讀，
剩下百分之九十，是在為還沒讀的部分焦慮。
zh-tw.editorNote: 翻開書卻越讀越慌時發文，準備考試的同學會回「太真實」。
variations: 也能換成：「我讀書的時間，八成花在滑手機找讀書的動力。」
進階版：「我不是在讀書，我是在陪書坐著，順便一起崩潰。」

en.content:
Studying is really just ten percent reading,
and the other ninety percent is stressing about the part I haven't read yet.
en.editorNote: Post it when opening the book only makes you more anxious — fellow exam-preppers will reply 'too real'.
variations: Swap in: "Eighty percent of my study time goes to scrolling for the motivation to study."
Harder mode: "I'm not studying, I'm just keeping the book company while we both fall apart."

items.sourceNote: 'I'm not procrastinating, I'm doing side quests before the main mission' 支線任務梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不是在拖延，
我只是在正式開始讀書這個主線任務前，先把所有支線任務都刷完。
zh-tw.editorNote: 書擺在旁邊卻先去整理房間、追劇時發文，拖延同好會集體點頭。
variations: 也能換成：「主線我一定會破，只是要等支線的房間先掃乾淨、手機先滑完。」
進階版：「我的讀書進度是零，但我的『準備讀書』完成度已經百分之百。」

en.content:
I'm not procrastinating,
I'm just clearing every side quest before I start the main mission of actually studying.
en.editorNote: Post it when the textbook sits there while you tidy your room or binge a show — fellow procrastinators will nod along.
variations: Swap in: "I'll finish the main quest eventually, I just have to clean the room and finish scrolling first."
Harder mode: "My study progress is zero, but my 'getting ready to study' is one hundred percent complete."

items.sourceNote: '3 a.m. just one more page, 7 a.m. why am I like this' 熬夜心境轉折梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
凌晨三點的我還在說「再一頁就好」，
早上七點的我只想問「我到底為什麼要把自己搞成這樣」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 通宵趕報告到天亮、看到日出時發文，熬夜戰友會秒回同款崩潰。
variations: 也能換成：「熬夜的時候覺得自己是狠角色，天亮之後只覺得自己是災難。」
進階版：「我不是在熬夜，我是在跟明天的自己借命。」

en.content:
At 3 a.m. I'm still saying "just one more page,"
and at 7 a.m. I'm just asking "why do I do this to myself?"
en.editorNote: Post it when you've pulled an all-nighter on an assignment and watched the sunrise — fellow night owls will reply with the same meltdown.
variations: Swap in: "At night I feel like a legend, by morning I just feel like a disaster."
Harder mode: "I'm not staying up late, I'm borrowing life from tomorrow-me."

items.sourceNote: 'tired, broke, and laughing through the pain' 學生窮困伙食梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
月底的我很懂養生：
因為冰箱裡只剩下泡麵、白飯，和一顆放到有感情的雞蛋。
zh-tw.editorNote: 月底錢包見底、只能省吃儉用時發文，同樣月光的同學會苦笑認領。
variations: 也能換成：「我不是在減肥，我只是在配合我的存款一起瘦。」
進階版：「學餐漲五塊，我一個月的財務規劃就全毀了。」

en.content:
By the end of the month I'm really into clean eating —
because all that's left in the fridge is instant noodles, plain rice, and one egg I've grown emotionally attached to.
en.editorNote: Post it when your wallet's empty at month's end and you're rationing food — broke classmates will claim it with a bitter smile.
variations: Swap in: "I'm not on a diet, I'm just slimming down in solidarity with my bank balance."
Harder mode: "The dining hall raised prices by a buck and my whole monthly budget collapsed."

items.sourceNote: 'Due tomorrow? More like do tomorrow' 明天交明天做梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
作業明天要交？
那不就剛好可以明天再做，時間算得剛剛好嘛。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到 deadline 卻毫不緊張、繼續拖的人專用，貼群組會有一堆人對號入座。
variations: 也能換成：「deadline 不是壓力，是提醒我可以再耍廢一天的鬧鐘。」
進階版：「我從來不會提早做，因為我相信『最後一刻』從不遲到。」

en.content:
Due tomorrow?
That just means I can do it tomorrow — the timing works out perfectly.
en.editorNote: For the student who sees a deadline and feels zero panic — drop it in the chat and half the group will recognize themselves.
variations: Swap in: "A deadline isn't pressure, it's an alarm reminding me I get one more day to slack off."
Harder mode: "I never start early, because I trust that 'the last minute' always shows up on time."

items.sourceNote: 學期初教材全新、學期末照樣全新 共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
學期初我花大錢買了全新的課本，
學期末它還是全新的——連我都佩服自己保存得這麼好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 課本買了整學期沒翻、期末退書時發文，買了沒讀的同學都懂那個尷尬。
variations: 也能換成：「這本書唯一被翻開的一次，是我拍照上網二手拍賣的時候。」
進階版：「教材我沒讀，但書套包得整整齊齊，這也是一種認真吧。」

en.content:
At the start of the semester I spent a fortune on a brand-new textbook,
and at the end it's still brand new — honestly I'm impressed at how well I preserved it.
en.editorNote: Post it when the textbook you bought went untouched all term — anyone who buys books and never reads them knows the awkwardness.
variations: Swap in: "The only time this book got opened was when I photographed it to resell it."
Harder mode: "I never read the textbook, but the cover's perfectly wrapped — that counts as trying, right?"

items.sourceNote: internal only

zh-tw.content:
別人考前複習一整個月，我考前複習一整個晚上，
我們最後拿到的分數證明了——時間根本不是重點，命才是。
zh-tw.editorNote: 期中期末臨時抱佛腳、熬夜硬讀一晚就進考場時發文，考運派同學都懂。
variations: 也能換成：「我不是沒念書，我只是把整學期的進度濃縮成一個晚上，很有效率好嗎。」
進階版：「複習範圍：全部。實際念到的：第一頁跟祝我好運。」

en.content:
Other people study for a whole month before the exam. I study for one whole night.
Our final grades proved one thing: time isn't the factor — luck is.
en.editorNote: Post it after cramming all night and walking into the exam — the pray-and-pass crowd feels this.
variations: Swap in: "I did study. I just compressed the entire semester into one night. That's called efficiency."
Harder mode: "Review scope: everything. Actually reviewed: page one and a silent prayer."

items.sourceNote: internal only

zh-tw.content:
分組報告最公平的地方，就是無論你做多少，
最後大家的分數都一樣——包括那個到現在還沒進群組的同學。
zh-tw.editorNote: 扛完整組報告、看到雷隊友照樣拿一樣分數時發文，做過主揪的都懂。
variations: 也能換成：「這組只有我一個人在做，但成員欄有五個名字，很神奇吧。」
進階版：「隊友已讀不回三週，交件前一小時傳來一句『我這部分要做什麼』。」

en.content:
The fairest thing about group projects is that no matter how much you do,
everyone gets the same grade — including the guy who still hasn't joined the group chat.
en.editorNote: Post it after carrying the whole project and watching the dead weight get the same grade — every project leader knows this pain.
variations: Swap in: "I'm the only one doing this project, but the member list has five names. Fascinating."
Harder mode: "Teammate left me on read for three weeks, then messaged an hour before the deadline: 'wait, what's my part?'"

items.sourceNote: internal only

zh-tw.content:
我報名這堂早八的時候，是真心以為我會變成一個早起的人。
事實證明，我只是多買了一堂看不到的課。
zh-tw.editorNote: 選課時對早八充滿幻想、開學後全數翹掉時發文，被早八背刺過的都懂。
variations: 也能換成：「早八教室裡最熟悉的臉，是投影幕上教授的簡報，因為我只看過那個。」
進階版：「我跟早八的關係很穩定——它每週準時開課，我每週準時錯過。」

en.content:
When I signed up for that 8 a.m. class, I genuinely believed I'd become an early riser.
Turns out I just bought a class I'd never actually see.
en.editorNote: Post it after fantasizing about the 8 a.m. slot at registration and then skipping every single one — anyone burned by early classes gets it.
variations: Swap in: "The most familiar face in that 8 a.m. room is the professor's slides, because that's all I've ever seen of it."
Harder mode: "My relationship with the 8 a.m. class is very stable — it starts on time every week, and I miss it on time every week."

items.sourceNote: 'eating cereal for dinner at 2 AM' 學生宵夜亂吃梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
只有在大學，凌晨兩點邊寫報告邊配一碗麥片當晚餐，
才會被當成一件完全正常的事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 熬夜趕作業、三餐時間全亂掉時發文，宵夜配報告的同學都懂。
variations: 也能換成：「我的三餐時間，是報告的截止時間決定的。」
進階版：「大學教會我，餓的時候手邊有什麼，那就是正餐。」

en.content:
Only in college is eating a bowl of cereal for dinner at 2 a.m. while writing a paper
treated as a completely normal thing to do.
en.editorNote: Post it when your meal times fall apart during an all-nighter — anyone pairing snacks with assignments gets it.
variations: Swap in: "My meal schedule is set entirely by assignment deadlines."
Harder mode: "College taught me that whatever's within reach when I'm hungry counts as a real meal."

items.sourceNote: 'my GPA and my will to live have the same trend line' 曲線同步梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
這學期我的 GPA 和我的求生意志，
畫出來是同一條往下掉的線。
zh-tw.editorNote: 成績越來越低、整個人越來越厭世時發文，準備看成績單的同學會苦笑。
variations: 也能換成：「我的分數跟我的心情，最近默契好到同進同退。」
進階版：「教授說要看趨勢，我看了，趨勢是往地心去。」

en.content:
This semester my GPA and my will to live
plot out as the exact same line heading down.
en.editorNote: Post it when your grades keep dropping and so does your soul — grade-check dread crowd will smile bitterly.
variations: Swap in: "My grades and my mood have been so in sync lately, they rise and fall together."
Harder mode: "The professor said to watch the trend. I watched. The trend is heading for the earth's core."

items.sourceNote: 'Dear exam, please be as easy as my professor said' 沒讀書祈禱梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
親愛的考卷，拜託你像教授說的那樣簡單，
祝好。——一個完全沒準備的學生敬上。
zh-tw.editorNote: 考前完全裸考、只能靠祈禱時發文，同樣沒念書的同學會秒懂。
variations: 也能換成：「我的考前準備，就是誠心祈禱考題全都考我剛好會的那一頁。」
進階版：「教授說『這題很基本』，我聽完的反應是我可能要重修了。」

en.content:
Dear exam, please be as easy as my professor promised.
Sincerely, a student who didn't study a thing.
en.editorNote: Post it before walking into an exam completely unprepared and running on prayers — fellow non-studiers get it instantly.
variations: Swap in: "My exam prep is sincerely praying that every question is on the one page I happen to know."
Harder mode: "The professor said 'this one is basic,' and my honest reaction was that I might be retaking this."

items.sourceNote: Dcard 大學生 靠同學筆記過活 共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
這學期我能順利活到期末，
全靠一個從來沒翹過課、又願意分享筆記的好人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 靠同學筆記混過整學期時發文，感謝那位班上救世主，同款寄生的同學都懂。
variations: 也能換成：「我不去上課沒關係，因為我認識一個會去上課的朋友。」
進階版：「別人的筆記是筆記，我朋友的筆記是我這學期的命脈。」

en.content:
The only reason I'll make it to finals this semester
is one good soul who never skips class and actually shares their notes.
en.editorNote: Post it when you've survived a whole term on a classmate's notes — a tribute to the class savior every freeloader relies on.
variations: Swap in: "It's fine that I skip class, because I know a friend who doesn't."
Harder mode: "Other people's notes are just notes; my friend's notes are my lifeline this semester."

items.sourceNote: 'same crippling fear of the participation grade' 平時分焦慮梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
新學期，一樣的教室，一樣對「平時成績」的恐懼，
因為我知道那三個字，翻譯成白話就是「你到底有沒有開口」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 怕被點名發言、平時分全靠緣分的同學專用，開學或期中發最有感。
variations: 也能換成：「平時分是我這學期最不平時的壓力來源。」
進階版：「教授說『平時多發言』，我發的言只有心裡的『拜託不要點到我』。」

en.content:
New semester, same classroom, same crippling fear of the "participation grade" —
because I know those two words really just mean "did you ever open your mouth or not."
en.editorNote: For students terrified of being called on, whose participation grade runs entirely on luck. Best at term start or midterms.
variations: Swap in: "The participation grade is the least casual source of stress I have all semester."
Harder mode: "The professor says 'speak up more,' and the only thing I say is a silent 'please don't call on me.'"

items.sourceNote: 'this syllabus is a contract / I didn't read my phone contract either' 課綱合約梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
教授說：「這份課綱等於一份合約，大家務必看清楚。」
沒問題，反正我連手機合約都沒看過就簽了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 第一堂課發課綱、看都沒看就收起來時發文，標準廢話文學句型，同學會回「太真實」。
variations: 也能換成：「課綱我當然有看，看的是第一頁跟最後的評分比例。」
進階版：「課綱寫得越詳細，代表這堂課越不好混，我懂了。」

en.content:
Professor: "This syllabus is basically a contract, so read it carefully."
No problem — I didn't read my phone contract before signing that either.
en.editorNote: Post it on the first day when you pocket the syllabus without reading a word — classic nonsense-literature format, friends will reply 'too real'.
variations: Swap in: "Of course I read the syllabus — the first page and the grade breakdown at the end."
Harder mode: "The more detailed the syllabus, the harder the class is to coast through. Message received."

items.sourceNote: 通勤生早八通勤 共感改寫

zh-tw.content:
同學走路五分鐘到教室，我通勤一個半小時，
所以早八對我來說不是早八，是早六。
zh-tw.editorNote: 外宿或通勤生的真實崩潰，配一張擠捷運或公車的照片最有畫面。
variations: 也能換成：「我一天最認真的時段，是趕那班不能錯過的公車。」
進階版：「通勤族的早八，是從鬧鐘響的那一刻就開始上課了。」

en.content:
My classmates walk five minutes to class; I commute an hour and a half,
so for me an 8 a.m. class isn't an 8 a.m. — it's a 6 a.m.
en.editorNote: A real meltdown for commuter students — most vivid next to a photo of a packed train or bus.
variations: Swap in: "The most disciplined part of my day is catching the one bus I can't afford to miss."
Harder mode: "For a commuter, the 8 a.m. class starts the second the alarm goes off."

items.sourceNote: 'Grades are posted. Time to enter witness protection' 成績出爐躲起來梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
成績公布了，
接下來這段時間，我決定進入證人保護計畫，等下學期再重新做人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 成績出爐後不想面對世界時發文，一起考爛的同學會秒回同款想消失。
variations: 也能換成：「成績單一出來，我的社交電量瞬間歸零。」
進階版：「別找我，我正在跟這學期的自己斷絕關係。」

en.content:
Grades are posted,
so for the foreseeable future I'll be entering witness protection and starting fresh as a person next semester.
en.editorNote: Post it when grades drop and you can't face the world — classmates who bombed too will reply with the same urge to vanish.
variations: Swap in: "The second the grades came out, my social battery hit zero."
Harder mode: "Don't look for me, I'm officially cutting ties with this semester's version of myself."

items.sourceNote: 'motivated to overwhelmed to dead inside to reborn during break' 學期情緒四階段梗改寫

zh-tw.content:
我的一個學期分成四種心情：
開學的鬥志滿滿、期中的喘不過氣、期末的形同虛設，然後放假的原地復活。
zh-tw.editorNote: 回顧整學期心境起伏時發文，適合期末考完或放假第一天總結用。
variations: 也能換成：「學期初的我和放假的我，中間隔了一整條崩潰的曲線。」
進階版：「我這學期唯一的成長曲線，是心情從滿格掉到沒電的那條。」

en.content:
My semester comes in four moods:
fired up at the start, gasping for air at midterms, completely dead inside by finals, and back from the grave once break begins.
en.editorNote: Post it when looking back on a whole term's emotional rollercoaster — great for right after finals or day one of break.
variations: Swap in: "The me at the start of term and the me on break are separated by one long meltdown curve."
Harder mode: "The only growth curve I had this semester was my mood draining from full to empty."
